source_notes.thresholds: BRAIN 官方 Alpha Check 标准 (LOW_SHARPE/LOW_FITNESS/HIGH_TURNOVER/CONCENTRATED_WEIGHT/SELF_CORRELATION/LOW_SUB_UNIVERSE_SHARPE)。Drawdown 非 BRAIN 硬性检查。
source_notes.official_checks: 官方模拟与 alpha check 是提交前必要证据。
source_notes.hard_gate_policy: P1-2: BRAIN hard gates (sharpe/fitness/turnover_platform/self_correlation/prod_correlation/weight_concentration/sub_universe_sharpe/turnover_min) are blocking — any failure prevents submission regardless of total score.

hypothesis: Random exploration volatility alpha from fundamental2 Secondary fusion after: weight_concentration <= 0.1 (actual: 0.14); sub_universe_sharpe >= 1.0425 (actual: 0.93); turnover_quality <= 0.3 (actual: 0.52); official_pass: BRAIN pass/fail
